title: Emphasis Selection for Written Text
description: Select words or phrases in short written text that should be emphasized (e.g., bolded or highlighted) to convey the author's intended meaning most effectively, based on SemEval-2020 Task 10 (Shirani et al.).
citation:

    year = "2020",
